prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your mental health college forward
items: Research and identify 3-5 mental health resources on your college campus including counseling services, support groups, and crisis hotlines
Schedule an initial appointment with your campus counseling center to establish care and learn about their services
Create a personal mental health toolkit by gathering 3-5 specific coping strategies that work for you during stress or difficult emotions
Complete intake paperwork and register for your college\
Download and set up a mental health tracking app or create a simple daily mood and energy journal to establish baseline patterns
Meet with your academic advisor to discuss your course load and identify classes that may create additional stress or mental health challenges
